regions.us-ports: Today in Miami, winds are light from the east-southeast at 5 knots with clear skies and less than 10% rain probability, providing excellent conditions for embarkation and shore excursions. Looking ahead toward day three, Miami and surrounding ports may encounter light drizzle with a 17% rain probability and east winds increasing to 12 knots, which could slightly dampen outdoor activities but should not significantly impact cruise operations.
